home.title: WattRent
home.subtitle: Easily manage your electricity bills and rent
home.welcomeSubtitle: Start by taking your first meter photo

capture.title: Capture Meter
capture.cameraPermissionTitle: Camera permission is required to capture meter readings
capture.setupRequiredHint: Enter your electricity rate, rent and previous reading in Settings before creating a bill.
capture.currentReadingCannotBeLower: Current meter reading cannot be lower than previous reading
capture.takePictureFailed: Failed to take picture, please try again
capture.selectImageFailed: Failed to select image, please try again
capture.imageProcessingFailed: Unable to recognize meter reading, please enter manually
capture.createBillFailed: Unable to create bill, please check network connection
capture.verifyReadingHint: Please verify the reading from the photo before saving.

history.title: Bill History
history.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this bill?
history.updatePreviousMeterReadingFailed: Failed to update previous meter reading
history.billMessage: Dear landlord, this month's rent is ${{rent}} plus electricity bill ${{electricityCost}}, total ${{totalAmount}} has been transferred. Please check.
history.loadError: Could not load bills. Check your network and try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.messageTemplateHint: Tap a tag below to insert it — tags become this bill's numbers when you share.
settings.exportDataMessage: Are you sure you want to export all bill records?
settings.clearDataMessage: Are you sure you want to clear all data? This action cannot be undone.
settings.unsavedChangesMessage: You have unsaved changes. Do you want to save before leaving?
settings.signOutMessage: You will need to sign in again to view or edit your bills.
settings.signOutFailed: Failed to sign out. Please try again.
settings.deleteAccountMessage: This permanently removes your account and you will lose access to your bills. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAccountFailed: Failed to delete account. Please try again.
settings.deleteAccountRecentLogin: For your security, please sign in again before deleting your account.

backend.unreachable: Cannot reach backend at {{url}}: ensure backend is running and your phone is on the same network.
backend.timeout: Request timed out after {{seconds}}s. Check your network and try again.

ocr.failed: Could not recognise the meter. Please enter the reading manually.
ocr.lowConfidence: Reading is uncertain ({{percent}}%). Please verify before saving.
ocr.notConfigured: OCR is not configured on the server (missing GEMINI_API_KEY).
ocr.compressionFailed: Failed to prepare image. Please try a different photo.
ocr.not_configured: Meter recognition is not configured on the server (missing GEMINI_API_KEY). Please enter the reading manually.
ocr.upstream_failed: The meter-reading service is temporarily unavailable. Please enter the reading manually or try again later.
ocr.no_response: The recognition service did not respond. Please enter the reading manually or retry.
ocr.invalid_model_output: Could not parse the recognition result. Please enter the reading manually.
ocr.download_failed: Could not load the image. Please retake the photo.
ocr.invalid_image: Invalid image format. Please try a different photo.
ocr.invalid_image_url: Invalid image address. Please retake the photo.
ocr.image_required: Please take or choose a meter photo first.

errors.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please slow down and try again in a minute.

dev.title: Developer Mode
dev.subtitle: Visible only in development builds.
dev.skipOcrHint: Skip Gemini API and fake a meter reading client-side. Saves cost while testing UI.
dev.forceMockHistoryHint: Show built-in sample bills instead of calling the backend.
dev.disableAdsHint: Preview the ad-free experience (paying users) without a real account.
dev.apiUrlHint: Leave empty to use auto-detected URL.
dev.clearCacheHint: Wipes settings + language preference from AsyncStorage.
dev.clearCacheConfirm: This will reset all locally stored preferences. Continue?

capturePreview.title: Confirm Bill
capturePreview.anomalyWarning: This usage ({{usage}} kWh) is more than twice last period ({{prev}} kWh). Please double-check the reading.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to sync your bills across devices.
auth.signUpSubtitle: We use your email only for sign-in and password reset.
auth.resetSubtitle: We will email you a link to set a new password.
auth.resetSent: If an account exists for that email, a reset link is on its way.
auth.notConfigured: Sign-in is not configured for this build.
auth.notConfiguredHint: EXPO_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_* environment variables are missing. Add them and rebuild.

errors.missingFields: Please fill in both email and password.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
errors.userDisabled: This account has been disabled. Contact support.
errors.emailInUse: An account already exists with this email.
errors.weakPassword: Password is too weak. Use 8+ characters with a mix of letters and numbers.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.operationNotAllowed: Email/password sign-in is not enabled. Contact support.
errors.requiresRecentLogin: Please sign in again before retrying this action.
errors.googleMisconfigured: Google sign-in is not configured for this build.
errors.googleIosDisabled: Google sign-in is not yet available on iOS.
errors.lineMisconfigured: LINE sign-in is not configured for this build.
errors.lineIosDisabled: LINE sign-in is not yet available on iOS.
errors.lineDisabled: LINE sign-in is disabled on the server. Try email or Google instead.
errors.lineInvalidCode: LINE rejected the sign-in attempt. Please try again.
errors.lineUpstream: Could not reach LINE right now. Check your connection and retry.
errors.accountExistsDifferentCredential: An account with this email already exists with a different sign-in method.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
